steps.title: Identify what the price rise did
steps.content: The passage says vintage card prices rose dramatically and then buyers who had not previously wanted the cards flooded the market. The blank should describe the price rise as drawing out or producing new demand.

steps.title: Reject gain and fulfillment meanings
steps.content: Choice A means taking advantage of something. Choice B means using something unfairly for benefit. Choice D means meeting demand, but the passage says demand was created or called forth. The word meaning drew out fits. The answer is C.
